changelog: Own gas stations: buy them, set per-litre prices, hire staff with permissions
Full management dashboard and a server-wide station admin panel
In-world 3D panels above the pump, visible to nearby players
Wrong-fuel consequences, jerry cans, electric charging and battery swaps
Stock deliveries: order wholesale, drive the tanker to the depot and back
QBox, QB-Core and ESX with every major inventory, 18 languages
